frqBank.title: 2-3 WK B Tangent Lines #1
frqBank.context: 2-3 WK B Tangent Lines #1 — Open the original worksheet: PDF · Answer key.

parts.question:
Created by B Passwater Worksheet 2-3 B Tangent Lines #1 AP Calculus Name______________________________

1. A function 푓 ( 푥 ) is continuous and differentiable for all values of 푥. It is known that 푓 ( −2 ) =5 and 푓 ᇱ ( −2 ) =−3. Write an equation of the line tangent to 푓 ( 푥 ) at 푥=−2.

2. The function 푔 is defined as 푔 ( 푥 ) =2푥 ଷ +푥−2. It is known that the derivative of 푔 is defined as 푔 ᇱ ( 푥 ) =6푥 ଶ +1. Write an equation of the line tangent to 푔 ( 푥 ) at 푥=2.

The function ℎ ( 푥 ) is differentiable for all values of 푥 with selected values of ℎ and ℎ ᇱ in the table above.

3. Write the equation of the line tangent to ℎ ( 푥 ) at 푥=2.

4. Write the equation of the line tangent to ℎ ( 푥 ) at 푥=−1.

5. (Calculator Active): The function 푟 is defined as 푟 ( 푥 ) =cos ( ln ( 푥 ଶ +4 )) . Write the equation of the line tangent to 푟 ( 푥 ) at 푥=−3.

푥 −4 −1 2 5 ℎ ( 푥 ) 1 −2 0 7 ℎ ᇱ ( 푥 ) −7 3 2 0

Created by B Passwater

The functions 푓 ( 푥 ) and 푔 ( 푥 ) are differentiable for all values of 푥 with selected values of 푓,푓 ᇱ ,푔,and 푔 ᇱ

above.

6. Let 푘 ( 푥 ) =푓 ( 푥 ) 푔 ( 푥 ) . It is known that 푘 ᇱ ( 푥 ) =푓 ( 푥 ) 푔 ᇱ ( 푥 ) +푓 ᇱ ( 푥 ) 푔 ( 푥 ) . Write the equation of the line tangent to 푘 ( 푥 ) at 푥=1.

7. Let 푝 ( 푥 ) = ௙ ( ௫ ) ௚ ( ௫ ) . It is known that 푝 ᇱ ( 푥 ) = ௙ᇱ(௫)௚ ( ௫ ) ି௙ ( ௫ ) ௚ᇱ ( ௫ ) [ ௚(௫) ] మ . Write the equation of the line tangent to 푝 ( 푥 ) at 푥=4.

8. Let 푚 ( 푥 ) =푓(푔 ( 푥 ) ). It is known that 푚 ᇱ ( 푥 ) =푓 ᇱ ൫푔 ( 푥 ) ൯푔′(푥). Write the equation of the line tangent to 푚 ( 푥 ) at 푥=−3.

9. Let 푞 ( 푥 ) =푔൫푓 ( 푥 ) ൯. It is known that 푞 ᇱ ( 푥 ) =푔 ᇱ ൫푓 ( 푥 ) ൯푓′(푥). Write the equation of the line tangent to 푞 ( 푥 ) at 푥=7.

푥 −3 1 4 7 푓 ( 푥 ) 1 4 −2 −3 푓 ᇱ ( 푥 ) 0 2 −1 6 푔 ( 푥 ) 7 −3 4 −5 푔′ ( 푥 ) 2 −5 3 7

parts.question:
Created by B Passwater Worksheet 2-7 Derivatives of Important Functions #1 AP Calculus Name______________________________

Directions: Find the derivative of the following functions. 1. 푓 ( 푥 ) =3cos ( 푥 ) 2. ℎ ( 푥 ) =ln ( 푥 ) −4푒 ௫

3. 푓 ( 푥 ) =sin ( 푥 ) −cos ( 푥 ) +3푥 4. 푔 ( 푥 ) = 푒 ௫ 5 −2ln ( 푥 )

5. 푦= 1 푥 − 1 √ 푥 + cos ( 푥 ) 7 6. 푓 ( 푥 ) =푥sin ( 2 ) +2푥 ିହ

7. 푦= 3 푥 ସ − √ 푥+4 √ 푥 8. 푦=ln ( 푥 ) −2푒 ௫ −4sin ( 푥 )

Directions: Find the equation of the tangent line at the given 푥-value 9.푓 ( 푥 ) =3cos푥+푥 at 푥= 휋 2 10. 푓 ( 푥 ) =4푒 ௫ −3sin푥+푥 ଶ at 푥=0

Created by B Passwater

Directions: For 11 – 14, the graph of 푓 ( 푥 ) is above and consists of several segments and a semi-circle on the interval [ −8,14 ] . On the interval [ 14,17 ] , 푓 is deβined as the equation 푓 ( 푥 ) =−2푥 ଶ +60푥−447.

11. ℎ ( 푥 ) =−2cos ( 푥 ) −푓 ( 푥 ) 12. ℎ ( 푥 ) =푒 ௫ +2푓 ( 푥 )

Find ℎ ᇱ ( 3 ) Find ℎ′(0)

13. ℎ ( 푥 ) =sin ( 푥 ) +3ln ( 푥 ) +3푥−푓 ( 푥 ) 14. ℎ ( 푥 ) =푓 ( 푥 ) −3+ 2 푥

Find ℎ ᇱ ( 4 ) Find ℎ′(16)

parts.question:
Created by B Passwater and FM Worksheet 2-8 & 2-9 A Product and Quotient Rules #1 AP Calculus Name______________________________

Directions: Find the derivatives of the given functions below. Use any method.

1. 푓 ( 푥 ) =2푥 ଷ cos ( 푥 ) 2. 푔 ( 푥 ) =푒 ௫ √ 푥

3. 푦=푥 ଶ ln ( 푥 ) −푥 ଷ 4. ℎ ( 푥 ) =4푥−푥 ଶ 푒 ௫ +5sin (푥)

5. 푦= ( 3푥−1 )( 4푥 ଶ +5 ) 6. 푘 ( 푥 ) =− 1 푥 −3sin ( 푥 ) −푥 ସ cos (푥)

7. ℎ ( 푥 ) = 4푥−1 3푥+2 8. 푔 ( 푥 ) = sin푥 푥

Created by B Passwater and FM 9. 푓 ( 푥 ) = 푥 ଷ +2푥 ଶ −푥 2푥 10. 푚 ( 푥 ) = 4푥 ln푥

11. 푦= 3푥 ସ −2푥 ଷ −3 √ 푥 푥 12.푦= 2푥 ହ cos푥

13. 푓 ( 푥 ) = 푒 ௫ 4sin푥 14. 푔 ( 푥 ) = 2푥+4 3푥+2

15. 푦= 푥 ଷ +3푥 ଶ −푥 푥 ଶ

frqBank.title: 2-8 & 2-9 WK B Product and Quotient Rules #2
frqBank.context: 2-8 & 2-9 WK B Product and Quotient Rules #2 — Open the original worksheet: PDF · Answer key.

parts.question:
Created by B Passwater and K Bakowski Worksheet 2-8 & 2-9 B Product and Quotient Rules #2 AP Calculus Name______________________________

Selected values of the twice differentiable function 푔 ( 푥 ) are given in the table above along with 푔 ᇱ ( 푥 ) and 푔 ᇱᇱ ( 푥 ) . Use this information to βind the following.

1. ℎ ( 푥 ) =푥 ଶ 푔 ( 푥 ) . Find ℎ ᇱ ( −4 ) . 2. 푘 ( 푥 ) =2cos(푥)푔′(푥). Find 푘′ ( 7 ) .

3. 푓 ( 푥 ) =푥∙ln(푥)−푔 ( 푥 ) . Find 푓 ᇱ ( 1 ) . 4. 푝 ( 푥 ) =푔 ( 푥 ) 푔′(푥). Find 푝′ ( −1 ) .

5. 푚 ( 푥 ) = 푔 ( 푥 ) 푥+1 . Find 푚 ᇱ ( 1 ) . 6. 푟 ( 푥 ) = 푔′(푥) 푔(푥) . Find 푟′ ( −4 ) .

푥 −4 −1 1 7 푔(푥) 1 2 −3 0 푔′(푥) 5 −4 2 −1 푔′′(푥) 2 6 3 −5

Created by B Passwater and K Bakowski

The graphs of 푓 ( 푥 ) and 푘 ( 푥 ) are shown above and consist of line segments. Let 푔 ( 푥 ) =푓 ( 푥 ) 푘 ( 푥 ) .

7. Find 푔 ᇱ ( 7 ) . 8. Find 푔 ᇱ ( 1 ) .

9. Let ℎ ( 푥 ) =푥 ଶ 푓 ( 푥 ) . Find ℎ ᇱ ( 10 ) . 10. Let 푚(푥)=푘 ( 푥 ) 푒 ௫ . Find 푚 ᇱ ( −1 ) .

11. Let 푟 ( 푥 ) =−2푥 ଷ 푓 ( 푥 ) . Find the instantaneous rate of change of 푟 ( 푥 ) at 푥=5.

12. Let 푠 ( 푥 ) =푥 ଶ −푓 ( 푥 ) . Find the average rate of change of 푠 ( 푥 ) over the interval [ 2,7 ] .

13. Let 푝 ( 푥 ) =−3cos ( 푥 ) 푘 ( 푥 ) +4푥. Write an equation of the line tangent to 푝 of at 푥=0.

2.1.title: 2-1 to 2-4: Derivative Foundations
2.1.content:
Derivative meaning

Derivative is instantaneous rate of change and slope of tangent line.

2.2.title: 2-5 to 2-7: Basic Rules
2.2.content:
Power + basic derivatives

Know derivatives of powers, trig basics, and exponentials.

2.3.title: 2-8 to 2-10: Product, Quotient, Trig
2.3.content:
Rule selection

Choose product/quotient rules when functions are multiplied/divided.

packet-pdfs.title: Packet PDFs (class notes & homework)

referenceHtml:
Unit 2 — Materials on this site include 8 notes PDFs, 23 homework PDFs, and 1 review PDFs. Open Materials (PDFs) in the sidebar for the full list.

The formula blocks below are the shared AP Calc AB reference; your unit packets explain how they show up in your course.
referenceBlurb: Shared AB formulas plus a short pointer to this unit’s PDF materials.

flashcards.back: Continuous at that point (not the converse).
n x^(n−1) (for real n where defined).
